scripts.build:worklets: node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild src/audio/worklets/synth-processor.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=public/worklets/synth-processor.js --target=es2020 && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild src/audio/worklets/meter-processor.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=public/worklets/meter-processor.js --target=es2020 && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild src/audio/worklets/transport-clock.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=public/worklets/transport-clock.js --target=es2020 && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild src/audio/worklets/audio-clip-player.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=public/worklets/audio-clip-player.js --target=es2020
